verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’m following Jesus, One step at a time; I live for the moment, In His love divine, Why think of tomorrow, Just live for today; I’m following Jesus, Each step of the way.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The pathway is narrow, But He leads me on; I walk in His shadow, My fears are all gone. My spirit grows stronger, Each moment, each day, For Jesus is leading Each step of the way.
